title: Partner uses an analysis to inform a program/report/grant/decision; outcome recorded (the deed)
context: This is the Definition of Shipped for the project: a real organization uses a disparities-analysis output to inform a concrete program, report, grant application, or community decision. The outcome must be recorded with the partner's confirmation and the steward's attestation. Framing and methods must be independently verified; any patient-facing piece must maintain 'not medical advice' framing. Without this, the project has not shipped regardless of merge status. Depends on: disparities-analysis-partner-016.
objective: Close the loop: the secured delivery partner demonstrably uses an analysis (technical brief, narrative report, or conditionally the public explainer) to inform a concrete program, report, grant, or community decision. Record the outcome with the partner's confirmation and the steward's attestation. Confirm that framing + methods are independently verified on all material used, 'not medical advice' framing is upheld on any patient-facing piece, and all quantitative assertions remain sourced. The steward records the outcome in the governance log.
acceptanceCriteria: The delivery partner demonstrably uses a disparities-analysis output (technical brief, narrative report, and/or public explainer if M4 shipped) to inform a concrete program, report, grant application, or community health decision
The outcome is recorded with the partner's written or signed confirmation describing how the analysis was used and what decision or program it informed
The steward's outcome attestation is recorded in the project governance log
Methods and framing are independently verified on all materials the partner used; the verification record is stored with the outcome log
Any patient-facing piece used by the partner maintains the 'general education, not medical advice — consult your care team' framing and the oncologist + advocate sign-off record is confirmed intact
The outcome record is the basis for Hee-Lee Oss reporting the deed as delivered: a real beneficiary, a confirmed concrete use, framing and methods verified
output: A governance outcome record documenting the partner's confirmed use of the analysis (program/report/grant/decision), the steward's attestation, the methods + framing verification confirmation, and the Hee-Lee Oss deed-delivery record.
